title: JUBILEE LA
galHiam: Gal Hiam: 246Key: AVerse1Heitui vangkhua piankum 100 cinna jubilee.Tuang hongtungta seino gualngaih aw.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hongpai-un lungdam khawmni, Nuam-in Topa phatkhawma
Phamsa tun leh zua ciin le tuai aw, zuanghong tho ve un
Kum 100 pawi-ah hong paiciat-un laambang pakkhawm Veni ee;
Tuan pupa leh tongdot te sinlai vabang phawngsak cia,
khangsawn momno te'n huan tubang ciinding aw.
Kum 100 cinna tu'n mualsuang kiphut zo ta ee,
Khangsawn note'n tuubang ciin na ding.
Khangsawn momnote vabang pil-in siam ciat ni,
Pile pu te'n mabang hong patsak.
